jobs.title: Early Collaborator
jobs.description: unit is in its earliest stages. I can't pay (yet), but if you believe in open source hardware and want to help shape the direction, let's talk.
responsibilities: Whatever you're good at — CAD, writing, testing, community, design
requirements: A skill you're willing to contribute
jobs.payment: Unpaid. But you'll get credit, free files, early access, and my eternal gratitude.
jobs.howToApply: Send a short email introducing yourself and what you'd like to help with.
